TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_nisepian_i_teban_nu_lalud, title = nisepian_i_teban_nu_lalud, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/nisepian_i_teban_nu_lalud} }

S.FORM: nisepian i teban nu lalud (kamu nu Hulam: šĽ≤Ś§ŹŚ§úšĻčŚ§Ę) kakungkuan a kamu tulu kina sasakamuen tu kunku, tumian u sakalimulakkan ni Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan pikikungan nuheni a kunku. linga tu sa, ci yama ni He-mi-ya pacician ci He-mi-ya pakasiacawa ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se an, tawyaay nu Si-la a lumaan taneng pabalucu tu wawaan nida a tatayna pakasiacawa, tataynaan a limucedan kanca amiduduc tu kawaw , anucaay piduduc a patayan atu pahutinan. kaisa ci He-mi-ya , atu ci La-san-de nikasasuwalan nuheni tu labii itida i kalakilanga masasuadih tiya milaliw. ci He-mi-ya sakamuen nida ku sakapahay nida a cabay ci Hay-li-na tu kiyaku nu heni, ci Hay-li-na' caay henay kaw matenesay nikaiyan ni Di-mi-te'-lu-se , mangalay pakanamuh ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se tu nabalucuan, sisa ci Hay-li-na' sakamuen nida ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se tuni kiyakian. . katukuh tu labii, ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se kilulen nida ci Hay-li-na , ci Hay-li-na mikilul ci He-mi-ya an, ci He-mi-ya makalah mikilim ci La-san-de an, sasepat ku nu heni i tini i kilakilangan masasungaliw, mangelu tu ku nuheni bi'satu i sasa nu kilang pahanhan. tawya, ci Sian-wan Aw-pu-lan atu ci Sian-huo Ti-tay-ni-ya makatukuh tina kilakilangan, mikiyaku milihida tu ci Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan pikikungan nuheni. . ci Ti-tay-ni-ya kaiyan nida pacaliw ku Iin-tu a lalimena'h a kalung pacaliw ci Aw-pu-lan mala kalung nida, sisa ci Aw-pu-lan pabalucu mibakin ci Ti-tay-ni-ya an. ci Aw-pu-lan mangalay tu lalimenah ci Pa-ke' mipelu' tu balu , milikemet ci Ti-tay-ni-ya tu balu nu cica' matela' i matanida nida, mahini sa ci Ti-tay-ni-ya sa anu palal sa a manamuh i takuwan sayaway ni kadihan nida a tademawan. . dumasatu ci Pa-ke' maadih nida tu nikabi ni La-san-de a tademaw, peluen nida ku balu nu cica' sipatelia' i mata nuheni, kya mapalal ku nuheni nu masasumidangay a tademaw kiya masasuacawa namin ku nuheni. i tawya, mitenunay ci Puo-tun atu mikuliay a cabay nida itida i kilakilangan migiki tu kalaluman a gikian "Pi-la-muo-se atu Si-se-pey"ÁöģśčČśĎ©śĖĮŚíĆŤ•ŅśĖĮŤ≤Ě"", kiyaku nu heni a itini i nipikikunngan ni Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan sapigiki, u saka tawaan a gagikian. kadihiyan kiya mitenunay ci Puo-tun paliyun sa tu dikuc, lawlawan nu lalimenah ci Pa-ke' mala tangah nu luy . nama hida satu ci Sian-huo Ti-tay-ni-ya manengil satu sayaay nikaadihan nida a tademaw u cinida, sisa ci Sian-huo mapatay nu ngalay ci tangah nu luy a udip ci Puo-tun nan. tapiingan nu kilakilangan, ci La-san-de atu ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se manengil sa sayaway kaadihan nu heni ci Hay-li-na' , sisa ci Hay-li-na' mala kanamuhan nuheni a tatusa, sulecad sa ci He-mi-ya kaiyan nina tatusaay. ci La-san-de atu ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se mangalay ci Hay-li-na' an malalebu' ku nuheni, ina tatusaay itini i kilakilangan mungangaw ku culil i sasa satu nu kilakilanga pahanhan. . ci Sian-wan Aw-pu-lan adih han nida caay kaw matatudungay, kiyu miyukiw tu lalimenah ci Pa-ke' kaw uysu tu kumin hulakay tu kawaw nu misu han. sisa ci Pa-ke' mikuliniw ci Ti-tay-ni-ya atu ci La-san-de tuni kakemetan, patelaen nida ku balu nu cica' i mata' nuheni. i tini ci Ti-tay-ni-ya makaadih tu sayawa a tademaw ci Aw-pu-lan , ci La-san-de sayaway makaadih ci He-mi-ya , mitenunay ci Puo-tun a tangah ni timaan mahulak tu, ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se ni timaan caay henay ka hulak, cinida atu ci Hay-li-na' a tahadauc sa ku nikasasungayan. Sin-wan atu Sian-huo masasukapah tu. kanihalan satu, masasumidangay atu mikuliay sibalucu tu tina labiian nuni kasi kawawan nai ku tatengaay a kawaw mahida u tahsepi hannanay. taluma' satu ku masasumidangay i Ya-tin , ci ama ni He-mi-ya caay tu pacici tu nabalucuan nida, maadih nida ku nika sumadan nu balucu ni Di-mi-te'-lu-se . masasumidangay tanunamuh sa milihida tunipi kikungan ni Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan nuheni, nina tatuluay a baluhay a tademaw malecad ku demiad a mikikun, miadih tu mitenunay ci Puo-tun atu cabay nuheni migiki caay kaw kalaluman nu katawatawaan a gikian. namakayiniay a nasulitan
S.PHON: nis…ôpian i t…ôban nu r~…ĺar~…ĺud (kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: *****) kakuŇčkuan a kamu tur~…ĺu kina sasakamu…ôn tu kunku, tumian u sakar~…ĺimur~…ĺakkan ni k…ô-siw-s…ô kun- ¶…ôa atu ¶i si-puo-r~…ĺi-t…ô ni-wan pikikuŇčan nuńß…ôni a kunku. r~…ĺiŇča tu sa, ¶i jama ni ńß…ô-mi-ja pa ¶i ¶ian ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja pakasia ¶awa ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô an, tawjaaj nu si-r~…ĺa a r~…ĺumaan tan…ôŇč pabar~…ĺu ¶u tu wawaan nida a tatajna pakasia ¶awa, tatajnaan a r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan kan ¶a amidudu ¶ tu kawaw , anu ¶aaj pidudu ¶ a patajan atu pańßutinan. kaisa ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja , atu ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô nikasasuwar~…ĺan nuńß…ôni tu r~…ĺabii itida i kar~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča masasuadińß tija mir~…ĺar~…ĺiw. ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja sakamu…ôn nida ku sakapańßaj nida a ¶abaj ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na tu kijaku nu ńß…ôni, ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na Ē~ ° ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kaw mat…ôn…ôsaj nikaijan ni di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô , maŇčar~…ĺaj pakanamuńß ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan, sisa ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na Ē~ ° sakamu…ôn nida ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô tuni kijakian. . katukuńß tu r~…ĺabii, ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô kir~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na , ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja an, ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja makar~…ĺańß mikir~…ĺim ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô an, sas…ôpat ku nu ńß…ôni i tini i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan masasuŇčar~…ĺiw, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu tu ku nuńß…ôni bi Ē~ °satu i sasa nu kir~…ĺaŇč pańßanńßan. tawja, ¶i sian-wan aw-pu-r~…ĺan atu ¶i sian-ńßuo ti-taj-ni-ja makatukuńß tina kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, mikijaku mir~…ĺińßida tu ¶i k…ô-siw-s…ô kun- ¶…ôa atu ¶i si-puo-r~…ĺi-t…ô ni-wan pikikuŇčan nuńß…ôni. . ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja kaijan nida pa ¶ar~…ĺiw ku iin-tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ôna Ē~ °ńß a kar~…ĺuŇč pa ¶ar~…ĺiw ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan mar~…ĺa kar~…ĺuŇč nida, sisa ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan pabar~…ĺu ¶u mibakin ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja an. ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan maŇčar~…ĺaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß ¶i pa-k…ô Ē~ ° mip…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu bar~…ĺu , mir~…ĺik…ôm…ôt ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja tu bar~…ĺu nu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° mat…ôr~…ĺa Ē~ ° i matanida nida, mańßini sa ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja sa anu par~…ĺar~…ĺ sa a manamuńß i takuwan sajawaj ni kadińßan nida a tad…ômawan. . dumasatu ¶i pa-k…ô Ē~ ° maadińß nida tu nikabi ni r~…ĺa-san-d…ô a tad…ômaw, p…ôr~…ĺu…ôn nida ku bar~…ĺu nu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° sipat…ôr~…ĺia Ē~ ° i mata nuńß…ôni, kja mapar~…ĺar~…ĺ ku nuńß…ôni nu masasumidaŇčaj a tad…ômaw kija masasua ¶awa namin ku nuńß…ôni. i tawja, mit…ônunaj ¶i puo-tun atu mikur~…ĺiaj a ¶abaj nida itida i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan migiki tu kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman a gikian "pi-r~…ĺa-muo-s…ô atu si-s…ô-p…ô"********"", kijaku nu ńß…ôni a itini i nipikikunŇčan ni k…ô-siw-s…ô kun- ¶…ôa atu ¶i si-puo-r~…ĺi-t…ô ni-wan sapigiki, u saka tawaan a gagikian. kadińßijan kija mit…ônunaj ¶i puo-tun par~…ĺijun sa tu diku ¶, r~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß ¶i pa-k…ô Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa taŇčańß nu r~…ĺuj . nama ńßida satu ¶i sian-ńßuo ti-taj-ni-ja man…ôŇčir~…ĺ satu sajaaj nikaadińßan nida a tad…ômaw u ¶inida, sisa ¶i sian-ńßuo mapataj nu Ňčar~…ĺaj ¶i taŇčańß nu r~…ĺuj a udip ¶i puo-tun nan. tapiiŇčan nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô atu ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô man…ôŇčir~…ĺ sa sajawaj kaadińßan nu ńß…ôni ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na Ē~ ° , sisa ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa kanamuńßan nuńß…ôni a tatusa, sur~…ĺ…ô ¶ad sa ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja kaijan nina tatusaaj. ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô atu ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô maŇčar~…ĺaj ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na Ē~ ° an mar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôbu Ē~ ° ku nuńß…ôni, ina tatusaaj itini i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan muŇčaŇčaw ku ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ i sasa satu nu kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇča pańßanńßan. . ¶i sian-wan aw-pu-r~…ĺan adińß ńßan nida ¶aaj kaw matatuduŇčaj, kiju mijukiw tu r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ônańß ¶i pa-k…ô Ē~ ° kaw ujsu tu kumin ńßur~…ĺakaj tu kawaw nu misu ńßan. sisa ¶i pa-k…ô Ē~ ° mikur~…ĺiniw ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja atu ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô tuni kak…ôm…ôtan, pat…ôr~…ĺa…ôn nida ku bar~…ĺu nu ¶i ¶a Ē~ ° i mata Ē~ ° nuńß…ôni. i tini ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja makaadińß tu sajawa a tad…ômaw ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan , ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô sajawaj makaadińß ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja , mit…ônunaj ¶i puo-tun a taŇčańß ni timaan mańßur~…ĺak tu, ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô ni timaan ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka ńßur~…ĺak, ¶inida atu ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na Ē~ ° a tańßadau ¶ sa ku nikasasuŇčajan. sin-wan atu sian-ńßuo masasukapańß tu. kanińßar~…ĺan satu, masasumidaŇčaj atu mikur~…ĺiaj sibar~…ĺu ¶u tu tina r~…ĺabiian nuni kasi kawawan nai ku tat…ôŇčaaj a kawaw mańßida u tańßs…ôpi ńßannanaj. tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu ku masasumidaŇčaj i ja-tin , ¶i ama ni ńß…ô-mi-ja ¶aaj tu pa ¶i ¶i tu nabar~…ĺu ¶uan nida, maadińß nida ku nika sumadan nu bar~…ĺu ¶u ni di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô . masasumidaŇčaj tanunamuńß sa mir~…ĺińßida tunipi kikuŇčan ni k…ô-siw-s…ô kun- ¶…ôa atu ¶i si-puo-r~…ĺi-t…ô ni-wan nuńß…ôni, nina tatur~…ĺuaj a bar~…ĺuńßaj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku d…ômiad a mikikun, miadińß tu mit…ônunaj ¶i puo-tun atu ¶abaj nuńß…ôni migiki ¶aaj kaw kar~…ĺar~…ĺuman nu katawatawaan a gikian. namakajiniaj a nasur~…ĺitan
S.FORM: nisepian i teban nu lalud (kamu nu Hulam: šĽ≤Ś§ŹŚ§úšĻčŚ§Ę) kakungkuan a kamu tulu kina sasakamuen tu kunku, tumian u sakalimulakkan ni Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan pikikungan nuheni a kunku. linga tu sa, ci yama ni He-mi-ya pacician ci He-mi-ya pakasiacawa ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se an, tawyaay nu Si-la a lumaan taneng pabalucu tu wawaan nida a tatayna pakasiacawa, tataynaan a limucedan kanca amiduduc tu kawaw , anucaay piduduc a patayan atu pahutinan. kaisa ci He-mi-ya , atu ci La-san-de nikasasuwalan nuheni tu labii itida i kalakilanga masasuadih tiya milaliw. ci He-mi-ya sakamuen nida ku sakapahay nida a cabay ci Hay-li-na tu kiyaku nu heni, ci Hay-li-na' caay henay kaw matenesay nikaiyan ni Di-mi-te'-lu-se , mangalay pakanamuh ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se tu nabalucuan, sisa ci Hay-li-na' sakamuen nida ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se tuni kiyakian. . katukuh tu labii, ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se kilulen nida ci Hay-li-na , ci Hay-li-na mikilul ci He-mi-ya an, ci He-mi-ya makalah mikilim ci La-san-de an, sasepat ku nu heni i tini i kilakilangan masasungaliw, mangelu tu ku nuheni bi'satu i sasa nu kilang pahanhan. tawya, ci Sian-wan Aw-pu-lan atu ci Sian-huo Ti-tay-ni-ya makatukuh tina kilakilangan, mikiyaku milihida tu ci Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan pikikungan nuheni. . ci Ti-tay-ni-ya kaiyan nida pacaliw ku Iin-tu a lalimena'h a kalung pacaliw ci Aw-pu-lan mala kalung nida, sisa ci Aw-pu-lan pabalucu mibakin ci Ti-tay-ni-ya an. ci Aw-pu-lan mangalay tu lalimenah ci Pa-ke' mipelu' tu balu , milikemet ci Ti-tay-ni-ya tu balu nu cica' matela' i matanida nida, mahini sa ci Ti-tay-ni-ya sa anu palal sa a manamuh i takuwan sayaway ni kadihan nida a tademawan. . dumasatu ci Pa-ke' maadih nida tu nikabi ni La-san-de a tademaw, peluen nida ku balu nu cica' sipatelia' i mata nuheni, kya mapalal ku nuheni nu masasumidangay a tademaw kiya masasuacawa namin ku nuheni. i tawya, mitenunay ci Puo-tun atu mikuliay a cabay nida itida i kilakilangan migiki tu kalaluman a gikian "Pi-la-muo-se atu Si-se-pey"ÁöģśčČśĎ©śĖĮŚíĆŤ•ŅśĖĮŤ≤Ě"", kiyaku nu heni a itini i nipikikunngan ni Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan sapigiki, u saka tawaan a gagikian. kadihiyan kiya mitenunay ci Puo-tun paliyun sa tu dikuc, lawlawan nu lalimenah ci Pa-ke' mala tangah nu luy . nama hida satu ci Sian-huo Ti-tay-ni-ya manengil satu sayaay nikaadihan nida a tademaw u cinida, sisa ci Sian-huo mapatay nu ngalay ci tangah nu luy a udip ci Puo-tun nan. tapiingan nu kilakilangan, ci La-san-de atu ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se manengil sa sayaway kaadihan nu heni ci Hay-li-na' , sisa ci Hay-li-na' mala kanamuhan nuheni a tatusa, sulecad sa ci He-mi-ya kaiyan nina tatusaay. ci La-san-de atu ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se mangalay ci Hay-li-na' an malalebu' ku nuheni, ina tatusaay itini i kilakilangan mungangaw ku culil i sasa satu nu kilakilanga pahanhan. . ci Sian-wan Aw-pu-lan adih han nida caay kaw matatudungay, kiyu miyukiw tu lalimenah ci Pa-ke' kaw uysu tu kumin hulakay tu kawaw nu misu han. sisa ci Pa-ke' mikuliniw ci Ti-tay-ni-ya atu ci La-san-de tuni kakemetan, patelaen nida ku balu nu cica' i mata' nuheni. i tini ci Ti-tay-ni-ya makaadih tu sayawa a tademaw ci Aw-pu-lan , ci La-san-de sayaway makaadih ci He-mi-ya , mitenunay ci Puo-tun a tangah ni timaan mahulak tu, ci Di-mi-te'-lu-se ni timaan caay henay ka hulak, cinida atu ci Hay-li-na' a tahadauc sa ku nikasasungayan. Sin-wan atu Sian-huo masasukapah tu. kanihalan satu, masasumidangay atu mikuliay sibalucu tu tina labiian nuni kasi kawawan nai ku tatengaay a kawaw mahida u tahsepi hannanay. taluma' satu ku masasumidangay i Ya-tin , ci ama ni He-mi-ya caay tu pacici tu nabalucuan nida, maadih nida ku nika sumadan nu balucu ni Di-mi-te'-lu-se . masasumidangay tanunamuh sa milihida tunipi kikungan ni Ke-siw-se kun-cea atu ci Si-puo-li-te ni-wan nuheni, nina tatuluay a baluhay a tademaw malecad ku demiad a mikikun, miadih tu mitenunay ci Puo-tun atu cabay nuheni migiki caay kaw kalaluman nu katawatawaan a gikian. namakayiniay a nasulitan

°-r~…ĺu-s…ô tuni kijakian. . katukuńß tu r~…ĺabii, ¶i di-mi-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺu-s…ô kir~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn nida ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na , ¶i ńßaj-r~…ĺi-na mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja an, ¶i ńß…ô-mi-ja makar~…ĺańß mikir~…ĺim ¶i r~…ĺa-san-d…ô an, sas…ôpat ku nu ńß…ôni i tini i kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan masasuŇčar~…ĺiw, maŇč…ôr~…ĺu tu ku nuńß…ôni bi Ē~ °satu i sasa nu kir~…ĺaŇč pańßanńßan. tawja, ¶i sian-wan aw-pu-r~…ĺan atu ¶i sian-ńßuo ti-taj-ni-ja makatukuńß tina kir~…ĺakir~…ĺaŇčan, mikijaku mir~…ĺińßida tu ¶i k…ô-siw-s…ô kun- ¶…ôa atu ¶i si-puo-r~…ĺi-t…ô ni-wan pikikuŇčan nuńß…ôni. . ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja kaijan nida pa ¶ar~…ĺiw ku iin-tu a r~…ĺar~…ĺim…ôna Ē~ °ńß a kar~…ĺuŇč pa ¶ar~…ĺiw ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan mar~…ĺa kar~…ĺuŇč nida, sisa ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan pabar~…ĺu ¶u mibakin ¶i ti-taj-ni-ja an. ¶i aw-pu-r~…ĺan
